scripts.dev: pnpm build:main && concurrently -k -n renderer,electron -c blue,green "vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && HANAIS_GUI_DEV_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist/main/main.js"
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.main.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.preload.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
